name: Homemade Egg Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store in a jar in the refrigerator up to 1 week. The mixture also freezes well.
4. To prepare scrambled eggs, fry slowly over low heat in a nonstick frying pan.
Yield: 4 servings (1 serving = 1/4 cup, equivalent to 1 egg)
Nutrition per serving: Calories 69, Protein 7 grams, Fat 3 grams, Fiber 0, Cholesterol <1 mg, Sodium 98 mg, Potassium 140 mg.
Exchange: 1 lean meat
Source information is not included in the recipe.
